title: cyrtomium boydiae
intro: Cyrtomium boydiae, also known as the Oriental Lady Fern, is a type of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique growth habit. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cyrtomium boydiae are numerous, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Cyrtomium boydiae can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
